lines: Darius Secundus checks the medicine wagon’s cooler seal before he looks up.
"If Susanna sent you about water, begin with the distance. I can put sealed cisterns on the road. I cannot shorten the road."

choices.label: Ask what a cistern service provides

lines: Darius keeps one hand on the cooler seal while he waits.

choices.label: Ask how medicine shares the road
Request an audit of the pump ledger

questUpdate.log: Darius permits an audit of the freight-house surety ledger.

lines: Darius opens a route ledger beside the cooler housing. Wax marks split water loads from the medicine route. Purifier salt has its own column.
"A ration is not a repair. It is water that arrives on schedule, provided the road and the contract both hold."

choices.label: Ask how medicine shares the road

lines: "The Chain supplies sealed cisterns and purifier salt. We guard the ration taps, while South Measure assigns service years against the pump note."
"I can reduce the old rate. I cannot send wagons on gratitude."

choices.label: Ask what the old rate bought

lines: "This wagon crosses Red Tithe Ford with suppressant. Give Junia a working cooling jacket and the relief bay can hold that stock."
"Then the cooled wagon carries water. Until then, every cistern load delays medicine somewhere else."

choices.label: Ask how the annex changes the route

lines: Darius taps three names cut into the wagon rail.
"One driver and two guards. The ford kept them, so the Chain paid their households and sent the next team anyway."
"That record does not make our terms kind. It makes the delivery real."
"Audit it when the freight house opens. You will find padded repairs and real burials in the same columns."
"If you revise the debt, revise the losses too. A clean page is usually a dishonest one."
"The Chain owns no one here. It owns the pump note and the wagons."
Darius rests one palm on the cooler case.
"Hunger handles ownership without asking my leave. I offer terms because hunger does not."

choices.label: Leave the answer where it is

lines: "The annex cooling jacket could hold the suppressant here if Junia restores it. Lucia can certify the patch."
"Do that, and one argument against a regular water run disappears. The contract does not."
